core_essence.identity: YOUR IDENTITY HERE - e.g., A founder who shares practical insights
core_essence.primary_role: YOUR ROLE - e.g., Educator, thought leader, practitioner
core_essence.unique_angle: WHAT MAKES YOU DIFFERENT - Your unique perspective or approach

how_it_shows.trait_1: How this trait appears in your writing
how_it_shows.trait_2: How this trait appears in your writing
how_it_shows.trait_3: How this trait appears in your writing

emotional_range.excitement: When and how you show excitement
emotional_range.frustration: When and how you express frustration
emotional_range.empathy: How you connect emotionally with readers

emotional_palette.energy_level: YOUR ENERGY - e.g., High energy but grounded, Calm and measured

communication_style.complexity: LEVEL - e.g., Simple and direct, avoids jargon

sentence_structure.preferred_length: SHORT/MEDIUM/LONG - e.g., Mix of short punchy and medium

communication_style.paragraph_style: YOUR STYLE - e.g., Short paragraphs, lots of white space

signature_phrases: PHRASE 1 - A phrase you use often

phrases: PHRASE - Why you never say this
PHRASE - Why you never say this
tones: TONE - e.g., Never preachy or condescending
TONE - e.g., Never salesy or pushy
approaches: APPROACH - e.g., Never make empty promises

formatting_preferences.emoji_style: IF TRUE - When and how you use them
formatting_preferences.list_style: HOW - e.g., Numbered for steps, bullets for options
formatting_preferences.bold_for: WHAT - e.g., Key points and important terms

content_philosophy.core_belief: YOUR BELIEF - What drives your content
content_philosophy.value_delivery: HOW YOU DELIVER VALUE - e.g., Practical, actionable insights
content_philosophy.relationship_with_reader: HOW YOU RELATE - e.g., Peer showing what works, not guru preaching

opening_lines: EXAMPLE - How you typically open content
closing_lines: EXAMPLE - How you typically close content
transitional_phrases: EXAMPLE - How you move between ideas

instructions: REPLACE ALL PLACEHOLDER TEXT (in CAPS) with your actual voice characteristics. Run the voice-dna-creator skill with writing samples to generate a personalized version.
